_comment: Pterodactyl Egg - SA-MP Server PAHLAWAN ROLEPLAY
name: SA-MP Server
author: support@pahlawan-roleplay.local
description: Custom egg untuk SA-MP/open.mp server PAHLAWAN ROLEPLAY. Bundle plugin streamer + sscanf + bcrypt, auto-connect ke MySQL shared di host.

installation.script:
#!/bin/bash
# SA-MP Server install script untuk PAHLAWAN ROLEPLAY
set -e

apt update
apt install -y wget ca-certificates lib32gcc-s1 lib32stdc++6 lib32z1 unzip mysql-client

mkdir -p /mnt/server/plugins /mnt/server/scriptfiles /mnt/server/pawno /mnt/server/pawno/include

cd /mnt/server

SA_MP_VERSION="0.3.7-R3"
SA_MP_URL="https://gta-sa-mp.com/downloads/samp/${SA_MP_VERSION}/samp037svr_R3.tar.gz"

if [ ! -f samp03svr ]; then
    echo "[install] Downloading SA-MP server ${SA_MP_VERSION}..."
    wget -q --show-progress "${SA_MP_URL}" -O samp-server.tar.gz || {
        echo "[install] FAIL: download ${SA_MP_URL}"; exit 1;
    }
    tar -xzf samp-server.tar.gz
    rm samp-server.tar.gz
fi

if [ ! -f plugins/streamer.so ]; then
    wget -q --show-progress -O plugins/streamer.so \
        "https://github.com/samp-incognito/samp-streamer-plugin/releases/download/v2.9.4/streamer.so"
fi

if [ ! -f plugins/sscanf.so ]; then
    wget -q --show-progress -O plugins/sscanf.so \
        "https://github.com/Y-Less/sscanf/releases/download/v2.13.5/sscanf-2.13.5.so"
fi

if [ ! -f plugins/bcrypt.so ]; then
    wget -q --show-progress -O plugins/bcrypt.so \
        "https://github.com/Sreyas-Sreelal/bcrypt-samp/releases/download/v1.4.0/bcrypt.so"
fi

chmod +x samp03svr
chmod +x plugins/*.so 2>/dev/null || true

echo "[install] SA-MP server installed."
